creator: eduardo@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Daniel Engberg from comment #1)

LTO_UNSAFE=yes reduced build from 26min -> 9min (same with LTO_UNSAFE=yes + Cargo.toml lto=false).

Now running it lapce doesn't core dump and don't log anything on /var/log/messages.

What I see with and without LTO is a very quick window that we can't see because is to fast to disappear.

Hum, need to learn about debugging rust.

Thanks!
